text:
is an Angel that is original to the Shin Japan Heroes Universe Amusement World attraction. It was introduced in the Shin 765 Operation event. https://twitter.com/SJHA_World/status/1553168494434422784 9:00 PM · Jul 29, 2022 

Profile

History

Shin 765 Operation

Trivia

Observing the illustration, it appears to be hold similarities with the Zetton kaiju from the Shin Ultraman movie. It is fused with the Tenth Angel from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.

Z-type is likely to be derived from Zetton name. 

Altering the brightness of the image, can show more details to the design. https://twitter.com/EvaEx2/status/1553647577483997184
